subject: ad3eddb772ccb7a93
findings: Both Majors fixed red-first with quoted before/after observations. M-A: reproduced the reviewer's GitHub Actions shell:pwsh wrapper simulation verbatim, observing STEP-EXIT=128 against the unfixed checkpoint-fetch step (absent ref), fixed by resetting $LASTEXITCODE to 0 on the absence branch, re-observed STEP-EXIT=0 for both absence and presence branches, and locked it in with a new regression test (CiWrapperSimulation.Tests.ps1) that extracts ci.yml's real run: text via YAML parsing and was itself confirmed red (Expected 0, but got 128) against the unfixed step before going green. gating-matrix.md's tier-2 row corrected to state the claim was false until this fix. M-B: Land-Verdict.ps1's header and usage example repointed from docs/reviews/ to artifacts/reviews/, with the one genuinely historical incident-narrative line kept factually accurate but annotated as retired rather than rewritten. Judgment call (disclosed): added a red-first-tested guard in Land-Verdict.ps1 refusing -Out targeting docs/reviews/, verified narrow (no false positive on a look-alike path), closing the gap at the write path per R10's claim. All 7 rebase-list minors addressed and bundled into the one fix-cycle commit (my call): 2 CLAUDE.md citations, 2 template citations, 1 schema citation, 1 stale header line, and .gitattributes' dead docs/reviews/** rule repointed (not removed) to artifacts/reviews/**. A repo-wide grep swept for remaining docs/reviews mentions and confirmed every one left untouched is either a frozen historical artifact (docs/plans, a hash-protected producer JSON record) or an intentional current-state reference (Migrate-Verdicts.ps1's default source, the new guard's own test fixtures). One pre-existing typo noticed but left unfixed as out of scope, disclosed rather than silently touched or silently ignored: .gitattributes:25's docs/artifacts/** pattern appears to have never matched anything real. Final HEAD e6d683303cc53e44e1e84b54d926741d818f83ca, 5 commits total on car/harness-car3, clean tree, nothing pushed. Verified: Pester tests 87/87 passed 0 failed, probes 12/12 passed 0 failed, Verify-Verdict.ps1 bare exit 0 with 24/24 files verified.
abstract: Fix cycle round 1 addressed both reviewer Majors (a real CI wrapper exit-code leak reproduced and fixed with a new regression test, and Land-Verdict.ps1's stale docs/reviews/ example plus an added write-path guard) and all 7 rebase-list minors, bundled into one commit at HEAD e6d6833, with 87/87 tests, 12/12 probes, and Verify-Verdict exit 0/24 confirmed clean.
